message:
fix(command): add strict numeric argument validation to Lua table library functions

Add lua_bad_number_arg, lua_required_integer_arg, and
lua_optional_integer_arg helpers that produce Lua-standard error
messages when non-numeric values are passed where numbers are
expected.

Apply strict validation to:
- table.insert(t, pos, value): pos must be a finite number
- table.remove(t, pos): pos validated via lua_optional_integer_arg
- table.concat(t, sep, i, j): start and end indices validated

This catches cases like table.insert(t, "x", 3) or
table.concat(t, ",", "x") that previously silently coerced or
defaulted to unexpected values.

Add tests: table_insert_rejects_non_numeric_position,
table_remove_rejects_non_numeric_position,
table_concat_rejects_non_numeric_start,
table_concat_rejects_non_numeric_end.

Update core_scripting.json conformance fixtures to cover the new
validation paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1395,6 +1395,32 @@
         "value": "ERR Error running script: bad argument #1 to 'concat' (table expected, got number)"
       }
     },
+    {
+      "name": "eval_table_concat_rejects_non_numeric_start",
+      "now_ms": 100,
+      "argv": [
+        "EVAL",
+        "return table.concat({'a', 'b'}, ',', 'x')",
+        "0"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "ERR Error running script: bad argument #3 to 'concat' (number expected, got string)"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "eval_table_concat_rejects_non_numeric_end",
+      "now_ms": 100,
+      "argv": [
+        "EVAL",
+        "return table.concat({'a', 'b'}, ',', 1, 'x')",
+        "0"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "ERR Error running script: bad argument #4 to 'concat' (number expected, got string)"
+      }
+    },
     {
       "name": "eval_select_function",
       "now_ms": 100,
@@ -1588,6 +1614,19 @@
         "value": "ERR Error running script: bad argument #2 to 'insert' (position out of bounds)"
       }
     },
+    {
+      "name": "eval_table_insert_rejects_non_numeric_position",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": [
+        "EVAL",
+        "local t = {1, 2}\ntable.insert(t, 'x', 3)",
+        "0"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "ERR Error running script: bad argument #2 to 'insert' (number expected, got string)"
+      }
+    },
     {
       "name": "eval_table_remove_last",
       "now_ms": 0,

+        "0"

+      "expect": {
